title: selaginella arenicola var. riddellii
intro: Selaginella arenicola var. riddellii, also known as Riddell's spikemoss, is a rare and endangered species of plant in the Selaginellaceae family, belonging to the group of primitive vascular plants called lycopods. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Selaginella arenicola var. riddellii include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve immune function, making it a valuable natural remedy for certain health conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential applications.
